subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150616734 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 150616734/456169002 
at 17:36:39.42 UT on the 16 of June 2015, tentatively classified as GRB,
is in fact not due to GRB.  This trigger is due to V404 Cyg.�
